overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in tactical gear exploring a dimly lit industrial storage facility with metal grating floors and overhead fluorescent lighting. The character walks through the warehouse space passing cargo containers and shelving units before ascending a metal staircase to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage bay with cargo containers and metal shelving

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial storage bay, passing stacked cargo containers and metal shelving units on the right

entered.detail: large stacked rectangular cargo containers wrapped in white material with strapping
tall industrial metal shelving unit with multiple levels holding various equipment
metal staircase with grated steps leading to an upper catwalk level
rectangular fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the industrial ceiling
wall-mounted control unit with illuminated green circular display

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial storage facility with metal grating floors. Stacked cargo containers line the right side while metal shelving units stand in the center distance. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the space as the character approaches a metal staircase on the left side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase ascending to upper catwalk

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the metal staircase to the upper level

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the staircase and climbing the metal steps to reach the upper catwalk level

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the upper level walkway

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and begins ascending the metal staircase. The cargo containers and shelving units fall behind as the camera follows the climb upward. The upper catwalk level with its metal railing becomes visible at the top of the stairs, while the wall control panel with its green indicator light passes by on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial storage facility that transitions from a ground-level warehouse to an elevated catwalk. It begins with the character walking across metal grating floors, passing stacked cargo containers and distant shelving units under the glow of overhead fluorescent lights. As the character approaches the left side of the room, the camera pivots to follow them as they begin ascending a metal staircase. The warehouse floor and its containers fall away behind the climber, who passes a wall control panel with a green indicator light on the way up. The scene finally opens onto the upper catwalk level, revealing a metal railing as the character reaches the top of the stairs.
